title: PackageManagerService verifyPendingInstall skips permission for negative verification IDs
notes: verifyPendingInstall (lines 6499-6529) and extendVerificationTimeout (lines 4994-5029) skip PACKAGE_VERIFICATION_AGENT permission check when verificationId < 0 (labeled 'testing verifiers'). Secondary UID check (checkRequiredVerifierUid/checkSufficientVerifierUid) still applies. Defense-in-depth weakened but not directly exploitable without matching verifier UID.
